data.title: Crypto Scam Alert! New Fake GitHub Trading Bot Is Draining Solana Wallets
data.description:
Cybersecurity firm SlowMist has issued a warning after a user lost their crypto assets by downloading what looked like a legitimate Solana trading bot. The project, called “solana-pumpfun-bot”, claimed to help users trade tokens on Pump. fun, …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/crypto-scam-alert-new-fake-github-trading-bot-is-draining-solana-wallets/

data.title: Hong Kong Treasury Secretary: Hong Kong's stablecoin licensing system will be implemented next month to strengthen the construction of the digital asset ecosystem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong Financial Services and Treasury Secretary Paul Chan said at the "Hong Kong Digital Finance Awards 2025" that the stablecoin issuer licensing system will be officially implemented next month, marking the further improvement of Hong Kong's digital asset regulatory framework. The four pillars of "LEAP" proposed in the "Hong Kong Digital Asset Development Policy Declaration 2.0" are also being promoted simultaneously, including legal supervision optimization, tokenization product expansion, cross-border application scenario development and talent cooperation, aiming to accelerate Hong Kong to become a reliable and sustainable Asian digital asset center. (Zhitong Finance)

data.title: Ripple and Tenity Launch XRPL Accelerator in Singapore with Funding Opportunities
data.description: According to PANews, Ripple and Tenity have introduced an XRPL accelerator program in Singapore, offering up to $200,000 in funding. This initiative targets early-stage startups in the Asia-Pacific region, focusing on the development and expansion of XRPL-based projects.

data.title: July Expert Predictions: Where Are BTC, ETH, and SOL Headed This Month?
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Bitcoin holds above $100,000 with strong ETF inflows, ending Q2 with gains over 30%. Ethereum remains below $3,000 but saw its revenue jump 133.7% over three months, outpacing Solana. Solana enters a critical July with key support at $130 and resistance near $160, as experts see potential for $175 or a drop to $115
source: https://cryptonews.com/reports/what-could-july-bring-for-bitcoin-ethereum-and-solana/

data.title: Intel Cuts Hundreds of California Engineers, Shuts Down Automotive Chip Unit
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, July 04, 2025- Intel has begun layoffs of more than 100 employees in California, including chip design engineers and architects, as part of a broader restructuring effort announced by CEO Lip-Bu Tan. The cuts are scheduled to start July 15 and follow Tan’s earlier warning that 15% to 20% of the company’s workforce […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/intel-cuts-hundreds-of-california-engineers-shuts-down-automotive-chip-unit

data.title: Binance Earn Announces Wormhole (W) Giveaway
data.description: Binance Earn announced a promotion of Simple Earn SOL Flexible Products with a daily Wormhole (W) giveaway. Wormhole (W) is a generic message passing protocol that enables communications between blockchains.Users who hold SOL Flexible Products from July 4, 2025 00:00 (UTC) to July 17, 2025 23:59 (UTC) will receive an APR Boost Giveaway in W Rewards on a daily basis, with the total reward pool consisting of 2,907,140 W.W APR Boost Giveaway Rewards will be automatically distributed to eligible Simple Earn SOL Flexible Products users’ Spot Accounts daily from July 5, 2025 10:00 (UTC).

data.title: Crypto Project Exit Scam Lawsuit Faces Dismissal Motion
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Daniel Ianello, accused of orchestrating an exit scam involving the crypto project The Phoenix, has filed a motion to dismiss a lawsuit against him in a Tennessee federal court. The complaint alleges that Ianello took control of Phoenix Community Capital in October 2022 and executed actions resembling an exit scam. After assuming control, he reportedly shut down the project's smart contracts and moved substantial investor funds. Plaintiffs claim he deleted posts on Discord, removed earlier versions of the Phoenix website, and announced that the smart contracts would not be restored.

In his defense, Ianello argues that he is a Michigan resident with no significant ties to Tennessee, asserting that the court lacks personal jurisdiction over him. He maintains that he did not sell any securities, as he joined the company by acquiring its assets after the alleged sales. Ianello further contends that he made no statements regarding the investments and accuses the plaintiffs of unjustly associating him with The Phoenix and its founders.

The Phoenix, now with a deleted website, had promised significant returns to its token holders through a profit release mechanism, leveraging a large capital pool of community assets for investment opportunities. It also claimed to offer an in-house incubation program to fund and manage new projects, purportedly leading to high-profit sharing with the community.

Crypto scams continue to be a significant concern in the industry. A recent report by blockchain security firm CertiK highlights that losses from crypto hacks, exploits, and scams surged to $2.47 billion in the first half of 2025. Cointelegraph also reported on a self-claimed victim of a crypto romance scam who has filed a second lawsuit against two banks after previously suing Citibank for missing red flags. Additionally, a man involved in a crypto Ponzi scheme was sentenced to nearly eight years in prison by a federal judge in Brooklyn, New York, underscoring the ongoing challenges posed by fraudulent activities in the crypto sector.

data.title: US Spot Bitcoin ETFs See $1B Inflows in Two Days After Brief Outflow Streak
data.description:
US spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds have rebounded sharply, recording over $1 billion in net inflows across Wednesday and Thursday after a brief setback.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/us-spot-bitcoin-etfs-see-1b-inflows-in-two-days-after-brief-outflow-streak/

data.title: U.S. Advances Cryptocurrency Legislation Amid Economic Shifts
data.description:
According to PANews, the United States is rapidly advancing legislation related to cryptocurrencies. On July 4, the 'Big and Beautiful Act' was passed in the House of Representatives. This legislative move comes amid a macroeconomic backdrop of fiscal expansion, which may undermine market confidence in the U.S. dollar and Treasury bonds. Concurrently, tax reduction policies and fiscal stimulus measures are creating a more favorable environment for crypto assets.

Additionally, the 'Genius Act' and 'Clarity Act,' focusing on stablecoins and market structure, are currently under review in the House. These bills are expected to see significant progress during the 'Crypto Week' on July 14. PANews provides detailed insights into the core content and latest legislative developments of these five key bills.

data.title: The central bank publicly solicits opinions on the "RMB Cross-Border Payment System Business Rules" to better meet the needs of CIPS business development
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The People's Bank of China publicly solicited opinions on the "Business Rules for the RMB Cross-Border Payment System (Draft for Comments)". The "Business Rules" clarify the detailed processes of account management, capital injection, and fund settlement for CIPS participants. With the continuous optimization of CIPS functions and services, it is necessary to adjust the relevant content of the "Business Rules" and only put forward principled requirements for the business behavior of participants to ensure the forward-looking and scientific nature of the normative documents and effectively adapt to the needs of CIPS business development and function upgrades. (Jinshi)

data.title: A-share listed company Jinyi Culture: Cainiao Weishi is currently exploring and researching stable currency business
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jinyi Culture released an investor relations activity record sheet announcement stating that Kaikeweishi is currently exploring and researching stablecoin business. Kaikeweishi has rich business and technical experience and reserves in the payment field, and also has reserves of relevant technologies for stablecoins. The company has a subsidiary in Hong Kong, but has not yet conducted any business. Kaikeweishi is currently exploring plans for overseas business expansion, and if there are related businesses in the future, they can be undertaken by Jinyi's Hong Kong subsidiary.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation provides three years of operating funding to Argot Collective to support its advancement of Ethereum infrastructure development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ethereum Foundation announced that it will provide Argot Collective with 3 years of operating funds to continue to support its advancement of Solidity language work and other key open source infrastructure of Ethereum.
It is reported that Argot was founded by former members of the Ethereum Foundation and is committed to maintaining the tools that Ethereum relies on.

data.title: Decentralized, Yet Somehow Also Custodial, Finance
data.description:
Columnist Jon Reiter analyzes a fundamental contradiction in the cryptocurrency/DeFi space regarding custody and regulatory exemptions.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/07/04/decentralized-yet-somehow-also-custodial-finance/

data.title: U.S. Debt Projected to Surge Amid New Legislation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a report from Cointelegraph, citing analysis by Kalshi, suggests that the passage of the 'Beautiful Act' is expected to cause U.S. national debt to soar to $40 trillion by the end of 2025.

The analysis highlights that when U.S. President Donald Trump signed the COVID-19 relief bill at the end of 2020, BTC/USD surged by 38% in the following weeks. Consequently, if a similar price movement occurs after the 'Beautiful Act,' Bitcoin could potentially exceed $150,000.

data.title: FTX Seeks Court Approval for Restricted Jurisdiction Claims as 82% of Value Comes from Chinese Users
data.description:
FTX is seeking court approval to dispute claims from 49 restricted jurisdictions, with Chinese users accounting for 82% of the total value despite constituting only 5% of allowed claims, creating new hurdles for creditors in countries with crypto trading restrictions.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ftx-seeks-court-approval-for-restricted-jurisdiction-claims-as-82-of-value-comes-from-chinese-users/

data.title: Options traders brace for ‘big July’ in Bitcoin and Ethereum after volatility drop in June, says Derive
data.description:
Derive. xyz options data show traders piling into July contracts for a breakout in Bitcoin and Ethereum despite hawkish macro cues.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/361087/options-traders-brace-for-big-july-in-bitcoin-and-ethereum-after-volatility-drop-in-june-says-derive?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Hainan Huatie: Completed the digitalization of nearly 26 billion yuan of assets and signed a strategic cooperation agreement with RWA Research Institute
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Hainan Huatie (603300.SH) announced that the company has cooperated with Ant Chain since 2022, by implanting MaaS trusted modules in the T-box of the aerial work platform, uploading equipment operation data to the blockchain, and realizing the "source trust" of data. At present, nearly 26 billion yuan of assets have been digitized and put on the chain, which has met the prerequisite for RWA financing to complete the chain. In addition, at the RWA Industry Conference, the company and RWA Research Institute, one of the organizers of the conference, signed a strategic cooperation agreement. The two parties will cooperate in three core directions: asset chain value revaluation, industry standard formulation, and global circulation practice. (Cailianshe)

data.title: Ripple Banking License Puts RLUSD in Focus As XRP Price Stays Cautious
data.description:
Ripple is expanding its presence in U. S. finance. The company has filed for a national trust, or rather, banking license with the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), aiming to shift its RLUSD stablecoin from state to federal regulation
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/04/ripple-banking-license-puts-rlusd-in-focus-as-xrp-price-stays-cautious/
